verification.note: The NRE exemption (Section 10(4)(ii)) and NRO taxability/TDS treatment are long-standing, unchanged provisions. Checked against the Income Tax Department's own exempt-income page and multiple current NRI filing guides; re-check only if a Budget/Finance Act amendment is reported.

source_refs: Income Tax Act, 1961, Section 10(4)(ii) (NRE interest exemption)
Income Tax Act, 1961, Section 195 (TDS on payments to a non-resident)
